MAIN.TITLE: ShirtGo
MAIN.SLOGAN: The best deals on promotional clothing.

WHO.TITLE: Who We Are
WHO.DESC: We are a platform that indexes the best clothing promotions. We connect supermarkets with delivery riders to bring your style home fast.

DIALOG.E1_DESC: Don't miss our summer flash sale! Up to 70% off on all summer items.
DIALOG.E2_DESC: Get ready for the winter with our new collection. Exclusive preview for members.

PAYS.TITLE: Payment & Discounts
PAYS.DESC: We accept all major cards and local payment methods with exclusive bank discounts.

AUTH.REQUIREMENTS: Must include: uppercase, number, and special character.

ABOUT.TITLE: About ShirtGo
ABOUT.DESC: The leading platform in Argentina connecting you with the best fashion brands and fast delivery.

SUPPORT.TITLE: Help Center
SUPPORT.SUBTITLE: Select a category to receive immediate assistance

RESPONSES.ORDER: You can track your order in real-time by clicking the map icon in the navigation bar. If you don't see it, your order is still being processed.
RESPONSES.PAYMENT: We accept all major local credit and debit cards. If you experience a payment error, please check with your bank or try another method.
RESPONSES.RETURN: You have 30 days to make changes or returns. You just need the purchase ticket and the garment must be in perfect condition.
RESPONSES.BRANCH: Our main branches are in the most important shopping malls in the country (Abasto, Unicenter, Alto Rosario). We are open from 10:00 AM to 9:00 PM.
RESPONSES.OTHER: For other personalized inquiries, please send us an email to support@shirtgo.com.ar and we will respond in less than 24 hours.
